items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate the implementation of opt-in/opt-out management. While the linked use case mentions this feature, there are no specific details or examples that confirm its functionality within the system. Therefore, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
